## Problem

What LLM governance problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the API, middleware behavior, or documentation change you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds or existing projects did you consider?

## Scope

Does this fit Onion Core's focus as a lightweight embeddable LLM call governance
layer? If this is agent orchestration, RAG, UI, or workflow persistence, explain
why it belongs here rather than in an application/framework layer.
